content.name: Thai Massage
content.description: Traditional Thai massage improves flexibility, relieves muscle tension, and boosts energy using stretching and pressure techniques.

content.name: Swedish Massage
content.description: A gentle full-body massage using long strokes to relax muscles, improve blood circulation, and reduce stress effectively.

content.name: Aromatherapy Massage
content.description: Uses essential oils with massage techniques to calm the mind, reduce stress, and enhance overall emotional well-being.

content.name: Hot Stone Therapy
content.description: Heated stones are placed on the body to relax muscles, improve circulation, and provide deep relaxation and comfort.

content.name: Head Massage
content.description: Relieves stress, improves blood flow to the scalp, and helps reduce headaches and mental fatigue.

content.name: Body Scrub Treatment
content.description: Exfoliates dead skin cells, leaving your skin smooth, glowing, and refreshed while improving blood circulation.

content.name: Body Wrap Therapy
content.description: Detoxifies the body using herbal or mineral wraps that hydrate skin and remove toxins effectively.

content.name: Reflexology
content.description: Applies pressure on foot points connected to body organs, promoting healing, relaxation, and better internal balance.

content.name: Foot Massage
content.description: A relaxing treatment focusing on feet pressure points to improve circulation and reduce stress.

content.name: Facial Treatment
content.description: Cleanses, exfoliates, and nourishes the skin, giving a fresh, glowing, and youthful appearance.

content.name: Anti-Aging Facial
content.description: Reduces wrinkles and fine lines using advanced skincare techniques to improve skin texture and elasticity.

content.name: Couples Massage
content.description: A relaxing spa experience for two people in the same room, enhancing bonding and relaxation together.

content.name: Balinese Massage
content.description: A combination of gentle stretches, acupressure, and aromatherapy to deeply relax body and mind.

content.name: Shiatsu Massage
content.description: Japanese therapy using finger pressure on energy points to restore balance and reduce stress.

content.name: Sports Massage
content.description: Designed for athletes to prevent injuries, improve flexibility, and speed up muscle recovery.

content.name: Back & Shoulder Massage
content.description: Targets tension in upper body areas to relieve stiffness, pain, and improve posture.

content.name: Herbal Compress Therapy
content.description: Warm herbal pouches are applied to relax muscles, reduce pain, and improve blood circulation.

content.name: Lymphatic Drainage Massage
